content:
# Business Checking Fee Waiver Policy

Use the business checking fee waiver values when comparing accounts or estimating a customer’s monthly cost. Recommend the account with the lowest_projected_monthly_fee_after_workflow_fit after confirming the customer’s expected workflow fit.

## Monthly Fee Schedule

The configured monthly fees for the business checking product set are 15, 25, 75. These values apply before any balance-based waiver is considered. See "Business Checking Product Comparison" when the customer needs a side-by-side account comparison rather than only the waiver calculation.

## Balance Waiver Review

1. Check whether the account has a minimum daily balance waiver. The configured minimum daily balance waiver values are 2000, 10000, None.
2. If that waiver is not available or not met, check whether the account has a combined deposit balance waiver. The configured combined deposit balance waiver values are 5000, 15000, None.
3. Where the configured waiver value is None, do not offer that waiver path for that product.

## Recommendation Handling

When two products could meet the customer’s activity needs, calculate the projected monthly fee after applying only the documented waiver values above. Do not assume a waiver from another business product page. For product-specific terms, use "Harbor Starter Business Checking Terms" or "Harbor Growth Business Checking Terms" as applicable.
title: Business Checking Fee Waiver Policy
